message.content: Map `<leader>gg` to open lazygit in a floating terminal in neovim. I'm using lazy.nvim.

content.text:
Add this to your plugin spec:

```lua
{
  "kdheepak/lazygit.nvim",
  cmd = "LazyGit",
  keys = { { "<leader>gg", "<cmd>LazyGit<cr>", desc = "LazyGit" } },
  dependencies = { "nvim-lua/plenary.nvim" },
}
```

No extra config needed; the plugin's defaults already open a floating terminal sized to the editor. If you'd rather use neovim's built-in terminal without the plugin: `vim.keymap.set('n', '<leader>gg', function() vim.cmd('terminal lazygit') end)` works too, but you lose the floating UI.
